join_order.probe: num(filtered: uom='USD', value IS NOT NULL)
join_order.notes: Use sub_sic_postings to materialize a tiny direct adsh lookup so only qualifying filings reach later joins.

join_order.build: pre(filtered stmt='EQ' and adsh in qualifying sub set; (adsh,tag,version) -> eq_count)
join_order.notes: First count reachable EQ rows, then build only the compact triple-count map for the filtered pre domain; do not maintain a separate pair dedupe structure during the postings scan.

join_order.build: tag(filtered to unique (tag,version) pairs derived from occupied filtered-pre triples; (tag,version) -> tlabel where abstract=0)
join_order.notes: After the pre triple-count map is built, scan its occupied buckets sequentially to extract unique reachable tag/version pairs, then probe tag_tag_version_hash once per pair to materialize a compact cache-resident pair->tlabel map.

data_structures.dim_filter: direct_array(max_adsh_code+1, value=sub_rowid_or_sentinel) populated from sub_sic_postings for SIC 4000..4999
data_structures.fact_join: compact_hash_map(pre_sized by reachable EQ rows, key=(adsh_u32,tag_u32,version_u32), value=eq_count_u32); then sequentially scan occupied triple buckets to derive unique reachable (tag_u32,version_u32) pairs and populate a compact_hash_map key=(tag_u32,version_u32), value=tlabel_u32; use tag_tag_version_hash only once per derived pair during build_joins
data_structures.aggregation: compact_hash_map(thread_local, key=(sic_i32,tlabel_u32,stmt_u16,cik_i32), value={sum_value:f64,count_rows:u64}); finalize by rolling up to (sic_i32,tlabel_u32,stmt_u16) and deriving COUNT(DISTINCT cik) from one company-grain entry per key

indexes.purpose: enumerate qualifying sub rows in SIC range and seed the filtered adsh lookup
enumerate only EQ pre rows, first to count reachable rows and then to build the compact filtered triple-count map
scan only USD num row ids in contiguous slices for the main fact pass
resolve each unique reachable (tag,version) pair once after it is derived from the filtered pre triple map

optimization_notes: Root cause: Category A/C/D. The remaining gap is dominated by build_joins wasted work: iteration 2 materializes a reachable (tag,version) dedupe table sized to all 1242132 EQ postings, which rounds to 4194304 buckets (about 32 MB before payloads) even though the filtered pre domain is only about 74423 reachable EQ rows and about 64656 filtered triples, and main_scan still uses dynamic morsels over a nearly uniform sequential USD row-id stream. The revised plan keeps the selective sub->pre->tag order, but builds only the compact filtered pre triple-count map from reachable EQ rows, derives unique tag/version pairs by scanning its occupied buckets sequentially, probes the persisted tag index once per derived pair to materialize the small tag map, and uses contiguous partition-parallel scan slices for the USD postings stream to reduce scheduling overhead while preserving row-order locality.
